<a name="ComponentHeartbeat"></a>
## type [ComponentHeartbeat](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/heartbeat.go#L41-L53>)

ComponentHeartbeat writes ComponentRegistration to the registry KV on a configurable interval.

### func [NewComponentHeartbeat](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/heartbeat.go#L56-L66>)


<a name="ComponentHeartbeat.Start"></a>
### func \(\*ComponentHeartbeat\) [Start](<https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/controller/heartbeat.go#L84-L86>)

```go
func (h *ComponentHeartbeat) Start(ctx context.Context)
```

Start begins writing heartbeats. It writes an initial registration immediately, then refreshes on each tick. On context cancellation it deregisters and returns.
